place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Luxurious Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Lamai
blurb: A polished three-bedroom pool villa in a quiet Lamai estate, wrapping a private pool and lawn beneath a green hillside. Single-storey, with three en-suite bedrooms, an open kitchen and generous living space opening to the terrace. ฿12,100,000.
detail:
Set in a peaceful residential estate in the hills of Lamai, this single-storey villa pairs bright, high-ceilinged interiors with a private pool and a backdrop of tropical green. It sits on 538 m² of land with 321 m² of built space, minutes from Lamai's beach, restaurants and everyday amenities.

Living is open and airy: a kitchen with a central island and breakfast bar flows into living and dining areas that slide open to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and their own outlook, with air-conditioning throughout and full furnishing.

The pool is framed by a sun terrace, lawn and a shaded lounge, with mature planting for privacy. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 26 years and 5 months remaining, running to December 2052. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
